title: IBM watsonx BI
introduction: Learn how to use watsonx BI to get personalized insights from your business data.

tiles.title: Fixes are available in watsonx BI on IBM Software Hub 5.3.1 patch 2
AWS Databricks available as a connector in watsonx BI as a Service
Microsoft Azure Databricks available as a connector in watsonx BI as a Service
New features and fixes are available in watsonx BI on IBM Software Hub 5.3.1 patch 1
IBM watsonx BI as a Service updated with new features and enhancements
IBM Granite 3 AI model is being discontinued and replaced with IBM Granite 4 model
IBM Cognos Analytics data modules and row-level security through User filters now supported
